title: Blog + local media storage (Celery WebP)
description: Blog domain: verify/extend models, local media upload (/media/ via Nginx), Celery WebP processing, blog API, bleach sanitization. NO MinIO — local storage only.

must_have: BlogPost.content_json(JSONB), content_html, og_image_url(local path /media/...), views(int=0), reading_time_minutes(int=0), status(draft|published|archived)
BlogPostMedia.url(local path), alt(NOT NULL), width, height, mime_type, size_bytes

media_api: POST /api/v1/media/upload  multipart/form-data -> saves to /media/{context}/{YYYY}/{MM}/{uuid}.{ext} -> starts Celery tasks.process_image -> returns {url, width, height}
DELETE /api/v1/media/{object_name}  -> removes file + all WebP variants + DB record

celery_task.name: tasks.process_image
steps: Pillow: detect width, height -> save to DB
Update url in BlogPostMedia/ProductImage to WebP version

caching.views: Redis INCR blog:views:{post_id}, Celery Beat flush every 10min

bleach_whitelist.note: iframe only YouTube/RuTube — check src domain

contracts: reading_time_minutes = max(1, word_count // 200) — recalculate on every save
bleach.clean() called before EVERY content_html save
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/media/upload — file saved, Celery task triggered
POST comment — status=pending, email encrypted in DB
